title: Bigger Barrels
description: This mod changes the size of the barrel from 3 to 6 rows.
body:
Bigger Barrels increases the size of the barrels from 3 rows to 6 rows. Why? because barrels don't get the love they deserve!

Installed on client it works for single-player worlds, if installed on server it works for all players without installing it on the client.

![Player interacting with 6-row barrel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba3cad82f3e1f63aa8a216797988b6fb3ecf767c.png)

⚠️ KEEP IN MIND: Removing the mod will result in all barrels reverting back to 3 rows and all items on the bottom 3 rows will be lost.
